ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: This Shared Folder is not on a Relay Server, or else you do not have permission to access it.
ast.target: 此共享文件夹不在中继服务器上，或者您没有访问权限。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: As Relay Server owner, you can manage this Shared Folder but cannot access its contents. You must be added to the Shared Folder in order to collaborate.
ast.target: 作为中继服务器所有者，您可以管理此共享文件夹，但无法访问其内容。您必须被添加到共享文件夹中才能进行协作。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Manage your organization's enterprise Relay tenants. Add tenants to switch between different enterprise deployments.
ast.target: 管理您组织的企业中继租户。添加租户以在不同的企业部署之间切换。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Sending Bug Report...
ast.target: 正在发送错误报告...

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Warning: high number of databases.
Consider cleaning up unused databases.
ast.target:
警告：数据库数量过多。
\n\t\t\t\t\t\t请考虑清理未使用的数据库。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Critical: approaching IndexedDB database limit!
Your browser may start deleting old databases soon.
ast.target:
严重警告：接近IndexedDB数据库限制！
\n\t\t\t\t\t\t您的浏览器可能很快会开始删除旧数据库。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Search across vaults
Warning: This is a dangerous setting. It allows you to delete relay databases from other vaults.
ast.target:
跨仓库搜索
警告：这是一个危险设置。它允许您删除其他仓库的中继数据库。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Create a new self-hosted Relay Server. Select an existing host or add a new one.
ast.target: 创建一个新的自托管中继服务器。选择一个现有主机或添加一个新主机。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Share folders with your team, edit together in real time, and keep your
	knowledge library exactly how you want it.
ast.target: 与您的团队共享文件夹，实时协作编辑，并按照您想要的方式维护您的知识库。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Why do I need to sign in?

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The owner of this Relay Server has disabled key sharing.
ast.target: 此中继服务器的所有者已禁用密钥共享。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The owner of this Relay Server has enabled key sharing.
ast.target: 此中继服务器的所有者已启用密钥共享。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Allow others to join this Relay Server with a Share Key.
ast.target: 允许其他人使用共享密钥加入此中继服务器。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Copy this configuration to your Relay Server's TOML file.
ast.target: 将此配置复制到您的中继服务器的TOML文件中。

ast.name: textContent
ast.target: 邀请用户加入此文件夹
